sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17679" key="au)todi/poun" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-δίπουν</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n17679.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ideal biped,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:105:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">105.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
